case_title: CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. ABDEL SDAIGUI et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SDAIGUI, ABDEL EACH INDIVIDUALLY  & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CASABLANCE A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP WIELGUS, MICHELLE NICOLE EACH INDIVIDUALLY & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CASABLANCA CAFE A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SDAIGUI, ABDEL EACH INDIVIDUALLY  & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CASABLANCE A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP WIELGUS, MICHELLE NICOLE EACH INDIVIDUALLY & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CASABLANCA CAFE A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
